nodes.label: IA Tab — Active Session Chat with Context Summary
nodes.description: AI (IA) tab showing 'Tu sesión activa' conversation view with back arrow and + / calendar icons. AI assistant message lists current session context: 15 min restantes, 3 apps fuera de tu mente, 1 ítem pendiente en tu ritual, 2 recordatorios activos. Offers action chips: 'Organizar mi horario', 'Añadir recordatorio', 'Sugerir ritual', 'Recomendar apps'. Second AI message confirms scheduling: '17:34 — Respira y vuelve a ti' notification setup with adjustment option. Input bar at bottom: 'Pregúntame algo o describe cómo te sientes...' with attachment and send icons.

nodes.label: AI Session Context Summary Card
nodes.description: AI assistant message bubble listing live session stats as bullet points: 15 min restantes de tu sesión, 3 apps fuera de tu mente, 1 ítem pendiente en tu ritual, 2 recordatorios activos. Demonstrates AI awareness of real-time session data.

nodes.label: AI Quick-Action Chips — Session Actions
nodes.description: Four tappable chip buttons below AI context message: 'Organizar mi horario', 'Añadir recordatorio', 'Sugerir ritual', 'Recomendar apps'. Provides quick AI action shortcuts from within session.

nodes.label: AI Schedule Confirmation Message
nodes.description: Second AI bubble confirming scheduled notification '17:34 — Respira y vuelve a ti' with offer to adjust timing. Shows AI can schedule in-session reminders/check-ins.
